stemHtml:
Which of the following statements is correct based on the following SNOWTAM Report for Runway 27 at Amsterdam (EHAM)?

EHAM 11 300 400 27 3/4/5 100/75/50 NR/04/03 SLUSH/WET SNOW/WET

options.a: The middle third of the runway has the worst braking conditions.
options.b: The first third of the runway is best as it is damp.
options.c: The entire runway has the same type of contamination.
options.d: The last third of the runway has the best brake coefficient.
